_desc: Audit of the battery's F10_dsin / F7_rope wins and the P4 ladder test. Reproduce with scripts/round4_oscillation_audit.py (p4_clean2) and p4_clean.py.

f10_period_audit.note: F10 mode-0 winners refit; period = 2*pi/rho. All periods >> window: F10 wins as a flexible NON-oscillating hump/decay (Taylor regime of cos), not damped rotation.

f7_rope_audit.note: rope-winning layers: fastest component ~1.2-1.6 cycles/window, others <1. Long-period shape fitting, not token-scale rotation.

p3_correction: 'oscillation real in the minority' should be retracted: no F10/F7 win shows a genuine sub-window oscillation. rho=0 holds everywhere, including the flip band (its F10 wins are humped non-monotone decays). Matches the in-situ FFT null.

p4_v2.method: continuous per-head rate (OLS log-slope of smoothed |dominant profile|), decay heads only, log-spacing CV vs log-uniform order-statistics null (500 draws)
p4_v2.result: 0/61 testable layers regular (integer-quantization artifact in half-distance version retracted); median cross-head rate dynamic range 2.7x vs RetNet ladder ~128x
p4_v2.verdict: P4 REJECTED, strengthened: heads cluster in a narrow rate band; no ladder of any kind.
